message:
🐛 Set MONITORING_NAMESPACE for OpenShift nightly E2E (#13)

The llm-d helmfile defaults monitoringNamespace to llm-d-monitoring
(for KIND clusters), but OpenShift uses its built-in user-workload
monitoring namespace. Explicitly set MONITORING_NAMESPACE to
openshift-user-workload-monitoring in the Deploy infrastructure step.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
